name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes Overview
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Welcome to the Neto by Maropost Release Notes!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this section, you'll find all product updates, ranging from new features and enhancements to bug fixes, that are sorted by the year they were released."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Explore the sections below to find the release notes for the year:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2374-2026-releases-overview","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"2026 Releases Overview"}]},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2098-2025-releases-overview","children":[{"text":"2025 Releases Overview"}]},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2136-2024-releases-overview","children":[{"text":"2024 Releases Overview"}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2138-2023-releases-overview","children":[{"text":"2023 Releases Overview"}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2139-2022-releases-overview","children":[{"text":"2022 Releases Overview"}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2140-2021-and-2020-releases-overview","children":[{"text":"2021 and 2020 Releases Overview"}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2141-2019-and-2018-releases-overview","children":[{"text":"2019 and 2018 Releases Overview"}]},{"text":""}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
